title: tontelea riedeliana
intro: Tontelea riedeliana, also known as Brazilian tree daisy, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It is native to South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tontelea riedeliana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can be used to make herbal supplements that are available in capsule or tablet form.
